TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dalia_Grybauskaitė, title = Dalia_Grybauskaitė, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dalia_Grybauskaitė} }

S.FORM: Dalia Grybauskaitė ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 3, Dalia Grybauskaitė, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Lithuania ta' misuw hya' ga Dalia Grybauskaitė, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. sraral hiya yaya Vitalija Korsakaitė (1922–1989) hintgan maki Biržai qalang. praw mtbaziy na squilq. hiya yaba Polikarpas Grybauskas (1928–2008) ptzyuwaw ringki ru ppiray turuy pincyogan nya. te sazing cinbwanan mciriq praw NKVD mhetay. Grybauskaitė Jawas bah Salomėja Nėris 高中. cyux sazing mtswe', qutux maki Lithuania, qutux maki Colorado Springs. hiya smoya biru na zywaw kinbkisan,k'kian ru uli . 11 kawas, Grybauskaitė aring sangka' unro. squilq na unro. 19 kawas, hiya qutux kawas pinyuwagan la, galan pkensa pincyogan nya, maki Lithuanian koka Philharmonic . Grybauskaitė mqwas beh Saint Petersburg State krahu' pqwasan. trang son Leningrad A.A.sezi' ggalan pila na seto. t'aring mtzyaw koba maki Saint Petersburg. 1983 kawas, spiyang magal zyaw na sakinning maki Vilnius. 1983-1989 kawas 12 byacing, hiya ga Communist Party. 1989 kawas 12 byacing lahan CPSU, 擔任 CPL squilq, tehoq 1990 kawas 6 byacing. qnxan nya Grybauskaitė ungat laqi ru ini kekong. hiya baq cingay ke' ego, Russian ,Polish ru baq kmal Frenc . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Dalia Grybauskaitė ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 3, Dalia Grybauskaitė, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Lithuania ta' misuw hya' ga Dalia Grybauskaitė, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. sraral hiya yaya Vitalija Korsakaitė (1922–1989) hintgan maki Biržai qalang. praw mtbaziy na squilq. hiya yaba Polikarpas Grybauskas (1928–2008) ptzyuwaw ringki ru ppiray turuy pincyogan nya. te sazing cinbwanan mciriq praw NKVD mhetay. Grybauskaitė Jawas bah Salomėja Nėris 高中. cyux sazing mtswe', qutux maki Lithuania, qutux maki Colorado Springs. hiya smoya biru na zywaw kinbkisan,k'kian ru uli . 11 kawas, Grybauskaitė aring sangka' unro. squilq na unro. 19 kawas, hiya qutux kawas pinyuwagan la, galan pkensa pincyogan nya, maki Lithuanian koka Philharmonic . Grybauskaitė mqwas beh Saint Petersburg State krahu' pqwasan. trang son Leningrad A.A.sezi' ggalan pila na seto. t'aring mtzyaw koba maki Saint Petersburg. 1983 kawas, spiyang magal zyaw na sakinning maki Vilnius. 1983-1989 kawas 12 byacing, hiya ga Communist Party. 1989 kawas 12 byacing lahan CPSU, 擔任 CPL squilq, tehoq 1990 kawas 6 byacing. qnxan nya Grybauskaitė ungat laqi ru ini kekong. hiya baq cingay ke' ego, Russian ,Polish ru baq kmal Frenc . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *alia ɣrjβaus~ɕkait* rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *alia ɣrjβaus~ɕkait*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw litħuania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *alia ɣrjβaus~ɕkait*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. s~ɕraral ħija jaja *italija kors~ɕakait* (*********) ħintɣan maki βir*ai qalaŋ. praw mtβazij na s~ɕquilq. ħija jaβa polikarpas~ɕ ɣrjβaus~ɕkas~ɕ (*********) ptzjuwaw riŋki ru ppiraj turuj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja. te s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq praw nk** mħetaj. ɣrjβaus~ɕkait* *awas~ɕ βaħ s~ɕalom*ja n*ris~ɕ **. ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕaziŋ mts~ɕweʔ, qutux maki litħuania, qutux maki ʦ~ʨolora*o s~ɕpriŋs~ɕ. ħija s~ɕmoja βiru na zjwaw kinβkis~ɕan,kʔkian ru uli . ** kawas~ɕ, ɣrjβaus~ɕkait* ariŋ s~ɕaŋkaʔ unro. s~ɕquilq na unro. ** kawas~ɕ, ħija qutux kawas~ɕ pinjuwaɣan la, ɣalan pkens~ɕa pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja, maki litħuanian koka pħilħarmoniʦ~ʨ . ɣrjβaus~ɕkait* mqwas~ɕ βeħ s~ɕaint peters~ɕβurɣ s~ɕtate kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan. traŋ s~ɕon leniŋra* a.a.s~ɕeziʔ ɣɣalan pila na s~ɕeto. tʔariŋ mtzjaw koβa maki s~ɕaint peters~ɕβurɣ. **** kawas~ɕ, s~ɕpijaŋ maɣal zjaw na s~ɕakinniŋ maki *ilnius~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, ħija ɣa ʦ~ʨommunis~ɕt partj. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ laħan ʦ~ʨps~ɕu, ** ʦ~ʨpl s~ɕquilq, teħoq **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ. qnxan nja ɣrjβaus~ɕkait* uŋat laqi ru ini kekoŋ. ħija βaq ʦ~ʨiŋaj keʔ eɣo, rus~ɕs~ɕian ,polis~ɕħ ru βaq kmal *renʦ~ʨ . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
